name: list_projects
description: Retrieve all projects accessible to the authenticated user in a Basecamp account. Returns project details including name, status (active/archived), and description. Use this to discover available projects before creating items within them.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Basecamp account. Required in the URL path.

body.name: Mobile App Launch
body.description: Building and launching the new mobile app
